license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfyjjpun
title: Glycine-Sodium Hydroxide Buffer
author: Neilier Junior

steps_raw.instruction: pH: pH 8.6 to pH 10.6 (a) 0.1 M Glycine; 7.5 g L -1 (M.W.: 75.0 g mol -1 ) (b) 0.1 M Sodium hydroxide; 4.0 g L -1 (M.W.: 40.0 g mol -1 ) Mix 50 mL, glycine and indicated volume of sodium hydroxide solutions. %s %s
Adjust the final volume to 200 mL with deionized water.
Adjust the final pH using a sensitive pH meter
